title: AllSummaries
description: Primary output of the citation-traverse step: per-snippet summaries from all traversal depths. Quotes in each summary are exact substrings of the source snippet text.

source_corpus_id.description: Semantic Scholar CorpusId of the source paper.

section.description: Section of the paper the snippet is from.

summary.description: 1-3 sentence summary of content relevant to the query.

quotes.description: Exact substrings of the snippet text supporting specific claims.

ref_corpus_ids.description: CorpusIds of papers referenced within this snippet.

depth.description: Traversal depth at which this snippet was found.
